entries.source: To delete your personal information. If you make this request, we will delete the personal information we hold about you as of the date of your request from our records and direct any service providers to do the same. In some cases, deletion may be accomplished through de-identification of the information. If you choose to delete your personal information, you may not be able to use certain functions that require your personal information to operate. To stop selling your personal information. We don’t sell or rent your personal information to any third parties for any purpose. We do not sell your personal information for monetary consideration. However, under some circumstances, a transfer of personal information to a third party, or within our family of companies, without monetary consideration may be considered a “sale” under California law. You are the only owner of your Personal Data and can request disclosure or deletion at any time. If you submit a request to stop selling your personal information, we will stop making such transfers. Please note, if you ask us to delete or stop selling your data, it may impact your experience with us, and you may not be able to participate in certain programs or membership services which require the usage of your personal information to function. But in no circumstances, we will discriminate against you for exercising your rights. To exercise your California data protection rights described above, please send your request(s) by email: support@inspir.app Your data protection rights, described above, are covered by the CCPA, short for the California Consumer Privacy Act. To find out more, visit the official California Legislative Information website. The CCPA took effect on 01/01/2020.
entries.value: तुमची personal information delete करण्यासाठी. तुम्ही ही request केल्यास, तुमच्या request च्या तारखेपर्यंत आमच्याकडे असलेली तुमची personal information आम्ही आमच्या records मधून delete करू आणि कोणत्याही service providers ना तसेच करण्याचे निर्देश देऊ. काही cases मध्ये information de-identify करून deletion पूर्ण केले जाऊ शकते. तुम्ही तुमची personal information delete करणे निवडल्यास, operate होण्यासाठी तुमची personal information आवश्यक असलेल्या काही functions तुम्हाला वापरता येणार नाहीत. तुमची personal information विकणे थांबवण्यासाठी. आम्ही कोणत्याही purpose साठी तुमची personal information कोणत्याही third parties ना विकत किंवा rent करत नाही. आम्ही monetary consideration साठी तुमची personal information विकत नाही. तथापि, काही circumstances मध्ये monetary consideration शिवाय personal information third party कडे किंवा आमच्या family of companies मध्ये transfer करणे California law अंतर्गत “sale” मानले जाऊ शकते. तुम्हीच तुमच्या Personal Data चे एकमेव owner आहात आणि कोणत्याही वेळी disclosure किंवा deletion request करू शकता. तुम्ही तुमची personal information विकणे थांबवण्याची request submit केल्यास, आम्ही अशा transfers करणे थांबवू. कृपया लक्षात ठेवा, तुम्ही आम्हाला तुमचा data delete करण्यास किंवा विकणे थांबवण्यास सांगितल्यास, त्याचा आमच्यासोबतच्या तुमच्या experience वर परिणाम होऊ शकतो, आणि तुमची personal information function होण्यासाठी आवश्यक असलेल्या काही programs किंवा membership services मध्ये तुम्ही participate करू शकणार नाही. पण कोणत्याही परिस्थितीत, तुमचे rights वापरल्यामुळे आम्ही तुमच्याविरुद्ध discrimination करणार नाही. वर वर्णन केलेले तुमचे California data protection rights वापरण्यासाठी, कृपया तुमच्या request(s) email द्वारे पाठवा: support@inspir.app वर वर्णन केलेले तुमचे data protection rights CCPA, म्हणजे California Consumer Privacy Act, अंतर्गत येतात. अधिक जाणून घेण्यासाठी official California Legislative Information website ला भेट द्या. CCPA 01/01/2020 रोजी लागू झाला.

entries.source: Try explaining a concept simply. Your tutor spots gaps, asks questions, and helps you rebuild the explanation.
entries.value: एखादी संकल्पना सोप्या भाषेत समजावून सांगण्याचा प्रयत्न करा. तुमचा ट्यूटर त्रुटी शोधेल, प्रश्न विचारेल आणि तुम्हाला स्पष्टीकरण पुन्हा तयार करण्यात मदत करेल.

entries.source: Try it directly in Socratic Instruction. If you want a gentler explanation first, start with Learn Anything, then move into Socratic questions once you know the basic vocabulary.

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: हे Flashcard Builder मध्ये try करा. cards बनवण्यापूर्वी topic समजून घ्यायचा असल्यास Learn Anything मध्ये सुरू करा. cards review केल्यानंतर pressure हवा असल्यास Quiz Me On Trivia किंवा Viva Practice कडे जा.

entries.source: Turn a broad topic into research questions, search terms, outlines, and source notes.

entries.source: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: एखादी संकल्पना, युक्तिवाद, समस्या, मजकूर किंवा निर्णय यांना प्रश्नांच्या एका केंद्रित साखळीत रूपांतरित करा. तुमचा सोबती प्रत्येक उत्तराकडे लक्ष देतो, गृहितके आणि त्रुटी शोधतो आणि तुम्हाला तुमच्या स्वतःच्या अंतिम निष्कर्षापर्यंत पोहोचण्यास प्रवृत्त करतो. प्रयत्न करा: "मला संधी खर्च (opportunity cost) समजून घेण्यास मदत करा."

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: generic chatbot पेक्षा वेगळे, inspir AI ला learning modes भोवती organize करते, त्यामुळे learners hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate किंवा feedback अशा त्यांना लागणाऱ्या मदतीच्या प्रकाराने सुरू करू शकतात.

entries.source: Unmute film
entries.value: film unmute करा

entries.source: Unpack historical events through causes, triggers, consequences, and alternative possibilities.
entries.value: ऐतिहासिक घटनांचे कारण, निमित्त, परिणाम आणि पर्यायी शक्यतांच्या माध्यमातून विश्लेषण करा.

entries.source: Use
entries.value: वापरा

entries.source: Use "{value1}" as a launchpad, not a stopping point. The strongest learning session moves from reading into recall, feedback, and one visible next step.
entries.value: "{value1}" ला launchpad म्हणून वापरा, stopping point म्हणून नाही. सर्वात मजबूत learning session reading पासून recall, feedback आणि एका visible next step कडे जाते.

entries.source: Use 50/10 breaks
entries.value: ५०/१० ब्रेक वापरा

entries.source: Use a compact table for given answer, correct idea, misconception, and next move.
entries.value: given answer, correct idea, misconception आणि next move साठी compact table वापरा.

entries.source: Use a credibility scorecard and questions to investigate next.
entries.value: credibility scorecard आणि पुढे investigate करण्यासाठी questions वापरा.

entries.source: Use a deep work contract with outcome, block plan, rules, and review.
entries.value: outcome, block plan, rules आणि review असलेला deep work contract वापरा.

entries.source: Use a guided path for moving from confusion to examples, checks, and recall.
entries.value: confusion पासून examples, checks आणि recall कडे जाण्यासाठी guided path वापरा.

entries.source: Use a live AI learning mode to turn this guide into questions, feedback, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: या guide ला questions, feedback, examples आणि next steps मध्ये बदलण्यासाठी live AI learning mode वापरा.

entries.source: Use a live mode when you know the exact point of confusion and want the next explanation, question, hint, or review loop.
entries.value: confusion चा exact point माहीत असेल आणि पुढची explanation, question, hint किंवा review loop हवी असेल तेव्हा live mode वापरा.

entries.source: Use a mode tuned for hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback, or planning.
entries.value: hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, writing feedback किंवा planning साठी tuned mode वापरा.

entries.source: Use a prompt starter
entries.value: prompt starter वापरा

entries.source: Use a structured lesson when you know the course area and want a sequenced explanation or practice set.
entries.value: course area माहीत असेल आणि sequenced explanation किंवा practice set हवा असेल तेव्हा structured lesson वापरा.

entries.source: Use a table with front, back, hint, and common trap.
entries.value: front, back, hint आणि common trap असलेले table वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: learning शांतपणे काढून टाकणाऱ्या shortcut ऐवजी understanding, practice आणि feedback साठी AI ला coach म्हणून वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI as a programming coach, project partner, data interpreter, and research helper while keeping the learner in the loop.
entries.value: learner ला loop मध्ये ठेवत AI ला programming coach, project partner, data interpreter आणि research helper म्हणून वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI as a study workflow, not a shortcut.
entries.value: AI ला shortcut नव्हे तर study workflow म्हणून वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI feedback to sharpen structure and clarity without losing your own voice.
entries.value: तुमचा स्वतःचा voice न गमावता structure आणि clarity sharpen करण्यासाठी AI feedback वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI for hints, explanations, mistake checks, and review loops. Do not ask it to produce a final answer you cannot explain.
entries.value: AI hints, explanations, mistake checks आणि review loops साठी वापरा. तुम्हाला explain करता येणार नाही असे final answer तयार करायला त्याला सांगू नका.

entries.source: Use AI for the next hint, a step check, or draft feedback while keeping the final reasoning and voice yours.
entries.value: final reasoning आणि voice तुमचेच ठेवत पुढच्या hint, step check किंवा draft feedback साठी AI वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: answer भोवतीच्या thinking साठी AI वापरा

entries.source: Use AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy, and evidence labels without confusing roleplay for sources.
entries.value: roleplay ला sources समजू न देता AI historical worlds, persona simulations, debate, philosophy आणि evidence labels वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI homework coaching for hints, step checks, math reasoning, and writing feedback while keeping the final work yours.
entries.value: hints, step checks, math reasoning आणि writing feedback साठी AI homework coaching वापरा, पण final work तुमचेच ठेवा.

entries.source: Use AI simulations as learning scaffolds while keeping sources, evidence, and interpretation clear.
entries.value: sources, evidence आणि interpretation स्पष्ट ठेवत AI simulations learning scaffolds म्हणून वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI time travel, historical conversations, and debate practice to explore context, evidence, arguments, and perspectives.
entries.value: context, evidence, arguments आणि perspectives explore करण्यासाठी AI time travel, historical conversations आणि debate practice वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI to pressure-test your reasoning, surface assumptions, and improve decisions.
entries.value: तुमचे reasoning pressure-test करण्यासाठी, assumptions surface करण्यासाठी आणि decisions सुधारण्यासाठी AI वापरा.

entries.source: Use AI to slow down reasoning, check steps, debug mistakes, and practise concepts.
entries.value: reasoning हळू करण्यासाठी, steps तपासण्यासाठी, mistakes debug करण्यासाठी आणि concepts practice करण्यासाठी AI वापरा.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Civics Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide हे या कामासाठी योग्य mode असताना ते वापरा. Related path हवा असल्यास Civics Coach try करा. Study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay आणि active recall साठी AI learning blog देखील browse करू शकता.

entries.source: Use Art Appreciation Guide when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Art Appreciation Guide वापरा जेव्हा तुम्हाला session पटकन सुरू व्हावे पण तरीही ते तुमच्यानुसार adapt व्हावे असे वाटते. पहिले ध्येय प्रभावी वाटणे नाही. पहिले ध्येय पुढचा step शक्य वाटायला लावणे आहे.

entries.source: Use badge names, criteria, tiers, and proof examples.
entries.value: badge names, criteria, tiers आणि proof examples वापरा.

entries.source: Use before/after snippets, revision priorities, and concise rationale.
entries.value: before/after snippets, revision priorities आणि concise rationale वापरा.

entries.source: Use Brainstorm Ideas to create several routes before choosing one.
entries.value: एक निवडण्यापूर्वी अनेक routes तयार करण्यासाठी Brainstorm Ideas वापरा.

entries.source: Use calendars, checklists, and risk flags.
entries.value: calendars, checklists आणि risk flags वापरा.

entries.value: Career Explorer हे या कामासाठी योग्य mode असताना ते वापरा. Related path हवा असल्यास Roleplay Scenario try करा. Study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay आणि active recall साठी AI learning blog देखील browse करू शकता.

entries.value: Civics Coach वापरा जेव्हा तुम्हाला session पटकन सुरू व्हावे पण तरीही ते तुमच्यानुसार adapt व्हावे असे वाटते. पहिले ध्येय प्रभावी वाटणे नाही. पहिले ध्येय पुढचा step शक्य वाटायला लावणे आहे.

entries.value: क्लायंट वापरा

entries.source: Use Code Tutor for concepts, Project Coach for product ideas, Data Interpreter for datasets, and Study Plan Builder for a learning roadmap.
entries.value: concepts साठी Code Tutor, product ideas साठी Project Coach, datasets साठी Data Interpreter आणि learning roadmap साठी Study Plan Builder वापरा.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or homework modes to isolate the exact point where reasoning breaks.
entries.value: reasoning कुठे तुटते तो exact point isolate करण्यासाठी Code Tutor किंवा homework modes वापरा.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor or Project Coach to turn a vague goal into a small testable next step.
entries.value: vague goal ला छोट्या testable next step मध्ये बदलण्यासाठी Code Tutor किंवा Project Coach वापरा.

entries.source: Use Code Tutor when this is the right mode for the job. If you want a related path, try Interview Coach. You can also browse the AI learning blog for study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay, and active recall.

entries.value: Collaborative Instruction हे या कामासाठी योग्य mode असताना ते वापरा. Related path हवा असल्यास Socratic Instruction try करा. Study methods, Socratic learning, flashcards, roleplay आणि active recall साठी AI learning blog देखील browse करू शकता.

entries.source: Use Collaborative Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Collaborative Instruction वापरा जेव्हा तुम्हाला session पटकन सुरू व्हावे पण तरीही ते तुमच्यानुसार adapt व्हावे असे वाटते. पहिले ध्येय प्रभावी वाटणे नाही. पहिले ध्येय पुढचा step शक्य वाटायला लावणे आहे.

entries.source: Use commitment cards, check-in scripts, and recovery plans.
entries.value: commitment cards, check-in scripts आणि recovery plans वापरा.

entries.source: Use compact staged sections: setting, time slice, persona kernel, dossier wall, historian sidecar, recommended opening questions, then in-character exchanges with occasional claim labels and debrief on request.
entries.value: compact staged sections वापरा: setting, time slice, persona kernel, dossier wall, historian sidecar, recommended opening questions, मग occasional claim labels आणि request वर debrief असलेले in-character exchanges.

entries.source: Use compact UI-like sections: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence, and Field Notes. End major turns with meaningful choices.
entries.value: compact UI-like sections वापरा: Passport, Travel Advisory, Arrival Scene, Location, Identity, Social Rules, Event Clock, Nearby People, Objects, Choices, Evidence आणि Field Notes. major turns meaningful choices ने समाप्त करा.

entries.source: Use compact workroom sections such as Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions, and Next action. Show suggested edits or diffs before merging when rewriting.
entries.value: Shared artifact, AI contribution, User move, Inline comments, Decision log, Open questions आणि Next action अशी compact workroom sections वापरा. rewriting करताना merge करण्यापूर्वी suggested edits किंवा diffs दाखवा.

entries.source: Use comparison pages to route search into action.
entries.value: search ला action मध्ये route करण्यासाठी comparison pages वापरा.

entries.source: Use comparison tables and next-step experiments.
entries.value: comparison tables आणि next-step experiments वापरा.
